project.source_strategy: Use sources to govern chapter argument, voice register, public title, source burden, and cross-chapter handoff. Each source should either thicken the chapter claim, sharpen a counterclaim, or constrain the public formulation.
project.distinctiveness_component_operation: run the task through the project's distinctive mechanism rather than summarizing the project in prose
project.distinctiveness_component_output: chapter-specific title, visual, source, argument, rewrite decision
project.acceptance_test: A reviewer can see why this project could not be swapped with another page without losing the mechanism.
project.best_improvement: Add chapter-level dossiers showing title logic, argument skeleton, source role, rewrite decision, and visual specificity for representative chapters.
project.build_status: specified proof plan; needs live or replayable demonstrator
